LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STRIKE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IN THE COMPLAINT AND TO RECLASSIFY THE CASE AS LIMITED JURISDICTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT TO PREPARE AN ORDER GRANTING THE MOTION TO STRIKE THE AMOUNT OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES SOUGHT AND RECLASSIFYING THE CASE AS A LIMITED JURISDICTION CASE, BUT RETAINING ALL OTHER PUNITIVE DAMAGES ALLEGATION. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Set For Trial On Oct-02-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Strike And Motion To Reclassify Action From Unlimited Jurisdiction To Limited Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Apr-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - COLY LAVELLA, TEL. NO. 1-510-470-1273, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. LESLIE A. LEYTON OF THE VARTAIN LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-415-391-1155 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant University of San Francisco's motion to strike prayer for punitive damages in the complaint and to reclassify the case as limited jurisdiction is granted. No opposition filed. Counsel for defendant to prepare an order granting the motion to strike the amount of punitive damages sought and reclassifying the case as a limited jurisdiction case, but retaining all other punitive damages allegation. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Kelley De Young, CSR #6780 =302/hk
